name: Plain source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for Plain (customer support): pulls open threads as Symphony tasks, and pushes terminal task status back by posting an INTERNAL note and marking the thread done (never a customer-facing reply). Reads its API key from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree Plain connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_plain).
